posts.text:
Elon, what do you want? We list some of the ways you could benefit from your influence with Trump. What are we missing? 

The News Not Noise Newsletter: Preparing for Trump 2.0, his picks, policies, and the Musk of it all. by @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

posts.text: The DOJ Withheld Epstein Files — That Mention Trump. Plus: Cuban troops fire on US boat. Introducing our next, least-qualified Surgeon General. Trump administration targets Minnesota, again. And an interview with House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark.

posts.text: Let Them Fly First Class: Kristi Noem’s DHS Luxury Jet Scandal. Inside Noem's flying palace. Plus: Pentagon demands obedient, deadly AI. The race to deploy untested nuclear reactors. Lawmakers move to rein in presidential pardons. And remembering Robert Duvall.
posts.quote: Let Them Fly First Class: Kristi Noem’s DHS Luxury Jet Scandal. Inside Noem's flying palace. Plus: Pentagon demands obedient, deadly AI. The race to deploy untested nuclear reactors. Lawmakers move to rein in presidential pardons. And remembering Robert Duvall.

posts.text: The murder of UnitedHealth Group CEO Brian Thompson invites a closer look at the health insurance industry - and the practice of denying claims to keep down costs.  What does industry practice teach us about privatizing services that meet basic human needs?   I get into that here.  Share your thoughts in comments.  #health #healthcare #insurance #government #care
